nasb.text: We have confidence in the Lord concerning you, that you are doing and will continue to do what we command.

esv.text: And we have confidence in the Lord about you, that you are doing and will do the things that we command.

cnv.text: 我們靠著主深深相信，你們現在以及將來都會遵行我們所吩咐的，

ccb.text: 我们靠着主深信你们现在遵行了我们的吩咐，而且以后还会继续遵行。

csbs.text: 至于你们，我们在主里深信，你们正在遵行，并且也将继续遵行我们所吩咐的。
